statement: In every magma, Equation 2819 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * w)) * w`) implies Equation 1533 (`x = (y * y) * (y * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0145
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z w)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op y (op z z)))
